chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos. 98, 99, 100, 101 & 102 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For orders as to non-prosecution. -------------- 11.02.2025. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Applicants. ------------ Matter is pending in non-prosecution since 2018 as compliance has not been made. Accordingly these Reference Applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place copy of this order in the connected Reference Applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
